product_title: Jbl Tune 670nc Adaptive Noise Cancelling Wireless On-ear Headphones
consensus_summary: The JBL Tune 670NC offers solid value for budget-conscious buyers seeking active noise cancelling headphones. Users praise the comfortable fit, decent sound quality, and effective noise cancellation for the price point. However, some report inconsistent ANC performance and build quality concerns that limit its appeal against slightly pricier competitors.
pros: Comfortable on-ear design suitable for extended wear
Effective adaptive noise cancellation at this price
Good battery life (up to 35 hours claimed)
Decent sound signature with reasonable clarity
Works well for calls and video conferencing
cons: ANC performance inconsistent across different frequencies
Build quality feels plasticky and somewhat fragile
Sound lacks depth compared to higher-end models
Controls can be unintuitive for some users
Limited app features and customization options
Noise isolation weaker than over-ear alternatives
red_flags: Reports of headband cracking or breaking after moderate use
ANC can worsen audio quality when activated
Some units experience connectivity stability problems
